Notice Of Motion And Otion To Change Venue, And Memo Of P&A; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Chun CChu Chang, Tel. 408.942.8617, defendant and moving party appearing on her own behalf.
My Do, non party translating/assisting the defendant.

No other appearance. The matter was discussed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS CHUN CHU "LINDA" CHANG and HIEU "KELVIN" THAI'S Motion To Change Venue is Denied. The court has been hampered in ruling on this motion by the failure of the parties to provide what may be essential information. The court has not received copies of the lease except for the page containing paragraph 29 or the declaration of Kelvin Thai. (The court asked the defendant for a copy of Mr. Thai's Declaration at the hearing which she could not provide.) Based on the materials the court has received (the moving papers filed February 28, 2012, the opposition papers to the prior motion filed February 8, 2012 and the complaint without any exhibits), the defendants have not satisfied their burden of showing that venue is improper in San Francisco. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Feb-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT CHANG, CHUN CHU "LINDA", THAI, HIEU "KELVIN" Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue is Off calendar. Duplicate entry.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue, And Memo Of P&A; Request For Judicial Notice; Pos
Off Calendar Feb-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CHANG, CHUN CHU "LINDA", THAI, HIEU "KELVIN" Motion To Change Venue is Denied without prejudice to being re-filed. The moving party did not provide courtesy copies of the moving as required by Local Rule 2.6B. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - NASSIR JAVID, TEL. NO. 816-2964, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
CHUNCHU CHANG, TEL. NO. (408) 942-8617, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS NASIR JAVID AND DEJAUNA JOSEPH'S Motion For Reconsideration To Strike The Order To Change Venue IS GRANTED DUE TO PARTIES STIPULATION TO UNDO WHAT WAS DONE. THE COURT INSTRUCTED THE PARTIES TO FILE A NEW MOTION. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HK

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Change Venue
Off Calendar Oct-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - KELVIN THAI, TEL. NO. 408-942-8617, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendants, Chun Chu Chang and Kelvin Thai's motion to change venue to County of Santa Clara is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
